sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check agent position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['hash'] == 'fa982fde30da5312':
        print(f"Agent: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check what changed
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
prev_lines = previous_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(len(lines)):
    if lines[i] != prev_lines[i]:
        print(f"Row {i} changed:")
        print(f"  Before: {prev_lines[i]}")
        print(f"  After:  {lines[i]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
